case_title: RENEE WOO VS. SAMUEL POINDEXTER III ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100105084)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-18-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOO, RENEE AS TO DEFENDANT POINDEXTER III, SAMUEL NIDO, LIGAYA TRAN, PAUL LYFT, INC.
